ab: na maka tua anema sun a mangtjez?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: na djemavac aken a mamaza.
en: I came on foot.

ab: a nema su pinakavavavan a mangetjez?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: na maka tua basu aken a mangetjez.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: uri pakatua anema sun a sema kiyukai?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: uri unting ti kama sake pivavai a vaik.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: maka tua anemanema timadju a magakku?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: maka vavavavaw tua jiyin timadju a magakku.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: maka tua anema a su vuvu a vavayan a veneli tua ljaceng?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: maka utubai timadju a vaik a veneli ta ljaceng.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: uri maka tua anema sun a sema Tau?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: uri maka tua varukur aken a sema Tau.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: uri maka tua anema timadju a sema Tau?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: uri maka hikuki timadju a sema Tau.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: uri maka tua anema timadju a sema Takau?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: uri maka tua kauti timadju a sema Takau.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: namaka kisiya timadju a sema Taitu?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ui, namaka kisiya timadju a sema Taitu.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: namaka kisiya timadju a sema Taitu?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ini, namaka hikuki timadju a sema Taitu.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: izua a ljaljevavavan tua basu a makamaza?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: izua, ljiazuau anan a pagalju ki su pacuni a ljaljevavavan tua basu.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: izainu a tjaljacunguan tua ljaljevavavan tua jiyin imaza?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: neka nu ljaljevavavan tua jiyin imaza, amin a maka haiya sun.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: ki makudakuda a maka tua basu sa djalun i gakku?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: ki izua 15 nu pung a zikangan sa djaljun i gakku.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: ki makudakuda nu zikangan a maka tua kauti sa djalun i Taiciyu?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: ki izua 1 nu zikangan.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: cuai a pasa Ulai nu unting tjen?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: ki maya izua 1 nu zikangan.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: ki makudakuda nu zikangan nu maka tua jiyin sun a sema tua nia umaq?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: ki izua 20 nu pung a zikang.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: saigu sun a maka didinsiya?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: saigu sun a maka tjukutjuku?
saigu aken a maka didinsiya.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: izua su utubai?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: izua ku utubai a ita.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: izua su utubai?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: neka nu ku utubai.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
